ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., XTZ, USDT) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain" TEXT /* Blockchain platform used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Launch date of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "exchange_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "rate" REAL /* Exchange rate value */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the exchange rate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchange_rates_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "price_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price change */,
  "change" REAL /* Absolute price change */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage price change */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "market_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Market trend indicator (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of market trends (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* Cost basis of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  "value" REAL /* Current value of the cryptocurrency in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolios_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "price_threshold" REAL /* Price threshold for the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "cryptocurrencies" TEXT /* List of cryptocurrencies covered in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request" TEXT /* Text of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_requests_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report" TEXT /* Text of the report */,
  "cryptocurrencies" TEXT /* List of cryptocurrencies covered in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES investor_requests ("request_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value for the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
